description_long: This is an adult male figure depicted in a casual urban outfit, featuring a short-sleeved t-shirt and fitted jeans. The figure stands upright with arms slightly extended away from the body, hands relaxed and fingers naturally splayed. The head is proportionate, with a medium-length, side-parted hairstyle that frames the face. The facial features are stylized but clearly defined, with a neutral expression. The figure wears low-profile sneakers, suitable for walking on city streets or sidewalks. The overall build is average, with realistic human proportions and no visible accessories or carried items.
description: A casually dressed adult male standing upright, wearing a t-shirt, jeans, and sneakers with a medium-length, side-parted hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, chest, and front of the t-shirt and jeans, with arms slightly out to the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the side of the torso, and the relaxed arm and leg posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, t-shirt, jeans, and both arms extended slightly outward.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, side of the torso, and the relaxed stance from the opposite side.
